name: Poison to Detect: Detection of Targeted Overfitting in Federated Learning
summary: arXiv:2509.11974v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training among clients without centralising data, making it a widely adopted privacy-en...
description: arXiv:2509.11974v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training among clients without centralising data, making it a widely adopted privacy-enhancing technology (PET). Despite its privacy benefits, FL remains vulnerable to orchestrator-driven privacy attacks. In this paper, we study an underexplored threat in which a dishonest orchestrator...
author: Soumia Zohra El Mestari, Maciej Krzysztof Zuziak, Gabriele Lenzini
